code.invalid: Tenant code must use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens with length 2 to 32
code.reserved: Tenant code is reserved by a deleted tenant

tenant.forbidden: User is not allowed to access the tenant

override.invalid: Tenant override header must be a valid tenant ID

precondition.vetoed: Tenant deletion was blocked by a lifecycle precondition

membership.exists: User is already a member of the tenant

membership.forbidden: Platform users cannot be added to tenant memberships

cardinality.violation: User already belongs to another tenant

tenant.required: Tenant plugin governance requires a tenant context

not.found: Tenant plugin does not exist or is not tenant scoped

revision.unavailable: Plugin runtime cache revision is unavailable

permission.denied: Only platform administrators can start tenant impersonation

token.unavailable: Impersonation token signing is not available
